subject: Driver card not activating - Jordan Wells
resolution: Mismatched last 4 of SSN in system - data entry error during card issuance. Corrected SSN and card activated successfully within 2 hours.

subject: Bulk card order - 5 new drivers
resolution: 5 cards processed and shipped. All activated successfully within 48 hours of receipt.

subject: Request to add 6 new driver cards
resolution: Pending

subject: Transaction declined - insufficient limit
resolution: Explained that account is at 68% utilization and approaching limit. Advised on payment timing to free up available credit. Raj was not satisfied and requested formal line increase review.

resolution: Pending

subject: Data export for annual audit
resolution: Generated and delivered 2024 transaction report (14,847 transactions). Linda confirmed receipt and format was acceptable.

subject: BuildOps transaction sync error
resolution: Pending

subject: How to add spending controls per driver
resolution: Walked Carlos through spending control settings in the Coast portal. Set up custom rules: 3 installer cards limited to fuel + hardware stores, Carlos's card unrestricted. Carlos seemed pleased with the granularity.
